"Fig. 4 displays the marginal effects of total annual rainfall

Table shows regression coefficients for the effect of climate measures (temperature and rainfall) on economic growth rates. The dependent variable is growth rate. The units of the climate measure are implicit in the variable names, e.g., annual rainfall is in units of rainfall, number of wet days is in days, etc. The effect sizes vary depending on whether regional or national clustering is used for the standard errors. No specific coefficient is extracted because there are many in the table.
